scenario: Capabilities are reported when PICO-8 is present

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
I ask the toolbox which capabilities are available
it reports that both static and run capabilities are available

scenario: Capabilities are reported when PICO-8 is absent

steps.text: no PICO-8 program is installed
I ask the toolbox which capabilities are available
it reports that only static capabilities are available
it reports that running and exporting are unavailable

scenario: Static work needs no PICO-8 program

steps.text: no PICO-8 program is installed
a valid cartridge
I check the cartridge's size
the size report is produced successfully

scenario: Running is declined when no PICO-8 program is present

steps.text: no PICO-8 program is installed
a valid cartridge
I try to run the cartridge
the toolbox declines and explains that no PICO-8 program is installed
it does not report the run as successful

scenario: Work outside the project boundary is refused

steps.text: a cartridge located outside the allowed project area
I try to read or change it
the toolbox refuses and explains the location is outside the project boundary

scenario: Read an overview of a cartridge

steps.text: a cartridge containing code, sprites, and a map
I read the cartridge's overview
I receive its code, its size, and a summary of its assets

scenario: Read a single tab of code

steps.text: a cartridge whose code is organised into several tabs
I read one tab
I receive only that tab's code

scenario: Read a cartridge that does not exist

steps.text: a location where no cartridge exists
I try to read the cartridge
the toolbox reports that the cartridge was not found

scenario: Read an empty cartridge

steps.text: a cartridge with no code and no assets
I read its overview
I receive an empty program and a size of zero

scenario: Writing code to a new location creates a cartridge

steps.text: a location where no cartridge exists
I write code to it
a new cartridge is created containing exactly that code
its updated size is reported

scenario: Writing code preserves existing assets

steps.text: a cartridge with existing sprites and a map
I replace its code
the code is replaced
the sprites and map are unchanged
its updated size is reported

scenario: Writing to one tab leaves other tabs unchanged

steps.text: a cartridge with several tabs of code
I write code to one tab
only that tab changes

scenario: Uppercase identifiers round-trip through the console's own form

steps.text: code written with uppercase identifiers
I write it to a cartridge and read it back
the code round-trips unchanged

scenario: A newly created cartridge carries no boilerplate

steps.text: a location where no cartridge exists
I write code to it
the cartridge contains only the code I wrote and no added structure or boilerplate

scenario: Edit a range of lines

steps.text: a cartridge with code
I replace a specific range of lines
only those lines change
its updated size is reported

scenario: Edit by finding and replacing text

steps.text: a cartridge whose code contains a specific phrase
I replace that phrase
the intended occurrences are replaced

scenario: Append code to a cartridge

steps.text: a cartridge with code
I append new code
the new code appears at the end and the rest is unchanged

scenario: An unmatched search changes nothing

steps.text: a cartridge whose code does not contain a given phrase
I try to replace that phrase
the code is unchanged
the toolbox reports that nothing matched

scenario: Editing a tab that does not exist is rejected

steps.text: a cartridge with fewer tabs than the one I target
I try to edit a tab that does not exist
the toolbox reports that the tab does not exist

scenario: Removing code increases the reported headroom

steps.text: a cartridge close to the token limit
I edit it to remove code
the reported headroom against the token limit increases

scenario: Valid code parses

steps.text: a cartridge with valid code
I parse it
it is reported as parsing with no errors

scenario: A syntax error is located

steps.text: a cartridge with a syntax error in its code
I parse it
the error is reported with a line and column

scenario: The console's shorthand is accepted as valid

steps.text: code using the console shorthand <form>
I parse it
it is reported as valid

examples.form: a single-line conditional without the usual closing word

scenario: An empty program parses

steps.text: a cartridge with no code
I parse it
it is reported as parsing with no errors

scenario: Clean code produces no lints

steps.text: a cartridge with clean code
I lint it
no lints are reported

scenario: Lint reports likely problems

steps.text: code that <trigger>
I lint it
a lint about <issue> is reported

examples.trigger: uses a variable that was never declared
declares a local that is never used
uses a number outside the console's numeric range
increases a counter every frame without bound
examples.issue: a value that will eventually overflow

examples.trigger: passes a full-turn angle measured in radians
examples.issue: angles being measured in turns rather than radians

examples.trigger: uses both the shared sprite region and the shared map region
examples.issue: sprite and map data overlapping in shared storage

examples.trigger: calls a standard-library function the console does not provide
examples.issue: an unavailable function, with the console's equivalent suggested

scenario: Size within the limits reports headroom

steps.text: a cartridge whose code is within the limits
I check its size
I am told its token, character, and compressed sizes
I am told it is within the limits

scenario: Exceeding the token limit is reported

steps.text: a cartridge whose code exceeds the token limit
I check its size
I am told it exceeds the token limit

scenario: Exceeding the distribution size limit is reported

steps.text: a cartridge whose compressed code exceeds the distribution size limit
I check its size
I am told it exceeds the distribution size limit

scenario: A static operation on a missing cartridge reports not found

steps.text: a location where no cartridge exists
I run any static operation on it
the toolbox reports that the cartridge was not found

scenario: Safe minification shrinks the cart and preserves behaviour

steps.text: a cartridge with verbose code
I minify it safely
the result is smaller in tokens, characters, and compressed size
the program's behaviour is unchanged
the before and after sizes are reported

scenario: Aggressive minification shrinks further than safe

steps.text: a cartridge with verbose code
I minify it aggressively
the result is smaller than safe minification would produce

scenario: Minifying into a separate cartridge leaves the original intact

steps.text: a cartridge
I minify it into a separate cartridge
the original is unchanged and a smaller cartridge is produced

scenario: Minifying in place updates the cartridge

steps.text: a cartridge
I minify it in place
the same cartridge is updated with the smaller code

scenario: Minification optimises the chosen measure

steps.text: a cartridge with verbose code
I minify it favouring <measure>
<measure> is reduced as much as the tool can manage

scenario: Minification can make an oversized cartridge fit for distribution

steps.text: a cartridge whose compressed code just exceeds the distribution size limit
I minify it favouring compressed size
its compressed code fits within the distribution size limit

scenario: Minifying already-minimal code stays valid

steps.text: a cartridge whose code is already minimal
I minify it
the result is still valid and no larger than before

scenario: Convert a cartridge between forms

steps.text: a valid cartridge in <source> form
I convert it to <target> form
a cartridge in <target> form is produced with the same content

scenario: A round-trip conversion preserves the cartridge

steps.text: a valid cartridge
I convert it to another form and back again
the cartridge is identical to the original

scenario: Converting to an image is refused when the code is too large

steps.text: a cartridge whose compressed code exceeds the distribution size limit
I try to convert it to a cartridge image
the toolbox declines and explains the code is too large to fit

scenario: Converting a file that is not a cartridge reports an error

steps.text: a file that is not a valid cartridge
I try to convert it
the toolbox reports that the cartridge could not be read

scenario: Read a sprite as a grid of colours

steps.text: a cartridge with a drawn sprite
I read that sprite
I receive an 8×8 grid of colour values

scenario: Write a sprite from a grid

steps.text: a cartridge
I set a sprite from an 8×8 grid of colours
the sprite matches the grid I provided

scenario: Write a sprite together with its flags

steps.text: a cartridge
I set a sprite and its flags together
both the sprite and its flags are updated

scenario: Reject a colour outside the palette

steps.text: a grid containing a colour outside the palette
I try to set a sprite from it
the toolbox rejects the grid as invalid

scenario: Reject a wrongly sized sprite grid

steps.text: a grid that is not 8×8
I try to set a sprite from it
the toolbox rejects the grid as the wrong size

scenario: Set a sprite's flags

steps.text: a cartridge
I set the flags on a sprite
those flags are recorded for the sprite

scenario: Read a region of the map

steps.text: a cartridge with a drawn map
I read a region of the map
I receive a grid of tile values for that region

scenario: Paint a region of the map

steps.text: a cartridge
I set a region of the map from a grid of tile values
that region matches the grid I provided

scenario: Reject a tile value out of range

steps.text: a grid containing a tile value outside the valid range
I try to paint the map with it
the toolbox rejects the grid as invalid

scenario: Reject a region beyond the map bounds

steps.text: a target region that extends beyond the map
I try to paint it
the toolbox rejects the request as out of bounds

scenario: Import an image into the sprite sheet

steps.text: a cartridge and an external image
I import the image into the sprite sheet
the sprite sheet reflects the image with its colours fitted to the palette

scenario: Import an image at a chosen position

steps.text: a cartridge and an external image
I import the image at a chosen position in the sprite sheet
the image appears at that position

scenario: Import an oversized image with shrinking

steps.text: an external image larger than the sprite sheet
I import it with shrinking enabled
it is scaled down to fit the sprite sheet

scenario: Export the sprite sheet as an image

steps.text: a cartridge with drawn sprites
I export the sprite sheet
an image of the sprite sheet is produced

scenario: Read a sound effect as notes

steps.text: a cartridge with a defined sound effect
I read that sound effect
I receive its notes in a structured form

scenario: Write a sound effect from notes

steps.text: a cartridge
I set a sound effect from structured notes
the sound effect matches the notes I provided

scenario: Run and capture a still image

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that draws to the screen
I run it for a number of frames and capture a still image
I receive an image of the screen
no runtime error is reported

scenario: Run and capture an animation

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that draws to the screen
I run it and capture an animation
I receive an animated capture of the run

scenario: Run for telemetry only

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge
I run it without capturing any image
I receive its telemetry and performance but no image

scenario: A runtime error is reported with its location

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that fails while running
I run it
the runtime error is reported with a message and a location
any output produced before the failure is returned

scenario: Scripted input drives the run

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that responds to button presses
I run it with a scripted sequence of button presses
the outcome reflects those presses

scenario: Runs with the same script are reproducible

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that responds to button presses
I run it twice with the same scripted sequence of button presses
both runs produce the same outcome

scenario: Traced values appear in the run output

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a running cartridge
I run it and ask to trace named values
those values appear in the run's output

scenario: Capture the screen at a chosen frame

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge whose screen changes over time
I run it and capture the screen at a chosen frame
the captured image is of that frame

scenario: A non-terminating cartridge is stopped

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that never finishes on its own
I run it
the run stops at its time limit
whatever was captured before stopping is returned
the run is reported as having timed out

scenario: Performance of a run is reported

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge with a heavy drawing routine
I run it
the peak and average per-frame processing load are reported

scenario: Code from every tab takes effect when run

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge whose code spans several tabs
I run it
code from every tab takes effect

scenario: A run cannot alter files outside its isolated workspace

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge that attempts to write files to the host
I run it
files outside the run's isolated workspace are left untouched

scenario: Export a web build

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge
I export it as a web build
a web build is produced

scenario: Export a native build

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge
I export it as a native application
a native application is produced

scenario: Bundle extra cartridges into a build

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge and additional cartridges to bundle with it
I export a build that bundles them
the additional cartridges are available within the build

scenario: Use a sprite as the build icon

steps.text: a licensed PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge with a suitable sprite
I export a build using that sprite as its icon
the build uses that icon

scenario: Exporting is declined when no PICO-8 program is present

steps.text: no PICO-8 program is installed
a cartridge
I try to export a build
the toolbox declines and explains that no PICO-8 program is installed

scenario: Retrieve the function reference

steps.text: the toolbox
I request the console's function reference
I receive an index of functions with a short description of each

scenario: Retrieve the guide to the console's pitfalls

steps.text: the toolbox
I request the guide to the console's pitfalls
I receive its notable quirks and constraints

scenario: A cartridge snapshot matches reading it directly

steps.text: a cartridge
I request its snapshot as reference data
it matches what reading the cartridge directly would return

scenario: Reference data is passive

steps.text: a cartridge
I request any reference data
no cartridge is modified and nothing is run

scenario: Operations do not trigger one another

steps.text: a cartridge
I write code to it
the code is not automatically linted, run, or minified

scenario: Exceeding the token limit does not block an editable-form write

steps.text: code that exceeds the token limit
I write it to a cartridge in editable form
the write succeeds
I am informed that the code exceeds the token limit

scenario: Each operation stands alone

steps.text: a cartridge
I perform any single operation
it completes without requiring any other operation to have run first

scenario: The toolbox offers only single-purpose operations

steps.text: the toolbox
I review the available capabilities
they are all single-purpose
there are no project templates, boilerplate, or multi-step recipes
